conservative.name: Magnificent Buboes
conservative.requirements:
6 Power
4+ Toughness. You must be afflicted by at least 1 disease

success.description:
Effect: Magnificent pustules form and swell on your skin, and within each one is a tiny, wriggling Nurgling. While this spell is recharging, you gain +1 Soak.
Once this spell recharges, roll . 1 Nurgling emerges form your buboes for each rolled, and begins behaving according to its nature. If you are critically wounded while this spell is recharging, the buboes pop and the spell recharges immediately
As above, but roll 1 extra when this spell recharges

boon.description: Add 1 fewer recharge tokens to this card
